status.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "db"."sc"."SAMPLE_COMMITS" sc JOIN "db"."sc"."LANGUAGES" l ON sc."repo_name" = l."repo_name" JOIN "db"."sc"."LICENSES" lic ON sc."repo_name" = lic."repo_name" WHERE l."language" = 'Shell' AND lic."license" = 'apache-2.0' AND LENGTH(sc."message") > 5 AND LENGTH(sc."message") < 10000 AND sc."message" NOT ILIKE 'merge%' AND sc."message" NOT ILIKE 'update%' AND sc."message" NOT ILIKE 'test%'
solved_subquestions_list: Count commit messages with length > 5 and < 10000, not starting with 'merge', 'update', or 'test'.
